name: Brownfield Cavekit Bootstrap — Personal Assistant
promise: One-session reverse-engineering of 16 domain cavekits from a working React PWA so AI agents can evolve it through the Cavekit lifecycle without rewrites.
business_value: Demonstrates the brownfield-adoption playbook end-to-end — full spec coverage of an existing codebase plus 8 real bugs surfaced as a side-effect of cavekit derivation.
